examples: The stolen works include Picasso's "Dove with Green Peas" and Matisse's "Pastorale".
It is ideal for those who love pastorale and nature, and seek a return to original nature!
Pastorale for Woodwind Quintet, Op. 151 (Beach, Amy Marcy). Flute, Oboe, Clarinet in B, Bassoon and Horn. Modern.
